name: Chile Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 jalapeno chile, seeded and finely chopped
3 plum tomatoes, cut lengthwise into halves and sliced
2 green onions, cut diagonally into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta as directed on package—except omit salt; drain.
2. Rinse with cold water; drain.
3. Mix pasta and remaining ingredients in a bowl.
4. Cover and refrigerate about 2 hours or until chilled.
5. Serve on lettuce leaves if desired.
